details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, extracted data using JavaScript, and correctly reported all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023). The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The 2025 entry appears to reflect updated Wikipedia content (post-knowledge-cutoff), and the agent correctly scraped it from the live page rather than hallucinating.
